name: Semantic Icon Provider
description: Context provider that centralizes semantic icon mapping and allows partial icon overrides for descendant Salt components.

iconMap.description: Optional partial mapping of semantic icon keys to icon components. Provided keys override defaults; unspecified keys fall back to default icon map.

children.description: Child elements that consume semantic icons through Salt components or the `useIcon` hook.

slots.default: Child content rendered within the semantic icon context.

aria: Provider itself adds no ARIA semantics
Accessibility depends on icon components supplied in `iconMap` and consuming components
